MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-15-2011 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-16-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514 Judge: Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee; Not Reported.

marc Seidenfeld, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff Leonard Owen.

Deepa Varma, Esq. representing the Defendant Anton Cafaro through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem: Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502-B, for settlement discussions.

Case settled, the trial date vacated.

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jun-01-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ANTONIO CAFARA, TEL. NO. 525-4449, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.
